description:
You are an IT-support technician who has received ticket **DNS-0001**.  
The requester needs written proof that both the IPv4 and IPv6 entries for **localhost** are present in the hand-over file  
/home/user/network_data/hosts_sample

That file already exists and contains several lines.  
Your job is to:

1. Search the file for the first line that contains the string **“127.0.0.1”** and the word **“localhost”** (case-sensitive, single space or tab separation is acceptable).  
2. Search the file for the first line that contains the string **“::1”** and the word **“localhost”**.  
3. Create the directory /home/user/network_data/verification (if it does not exist yet).  
4. Inside that directory create the text file /home/user/network_data/verification/localhost_resolution.log whose contents must be **exactly** four single-line records, no blank lines, in the order shown below:

TicketID: DNS-0001  
IPv4 entry found: <verbatim line from step 1>  
IPv6 entry found: <verbatim line from step 2>  
Status: PASS

Important formatting rules that the automatic checker will enforce:

• The file name is strictly /home/user/network_data/verification/localhost_resolution.log  
• Each line must end with a single UNIX newline (LF).  
• No extra spaces are allowed before or after any field value.  
• The two <verbatim line …> placeholders must be reproduced exactly as they appear in /home/user/network_data/hosts_sample (no trimming or re-ordering of whitespace).  
• There must be exactly four lines in the file.

The entire task can be completed with a very small set of shell commands (two or three should be enough).  
When the file is correctly created, the ticket is considered resolved.
truth:
Initial environment created by the grader:

1. Directory /home/user/network_data already exists and is writable by the current user.  
2. File /home/user/network_data/hosts_sample exists with the following exact contents (UNIX newlines):

127.0.0.1 localhost  
::1 localhost ip6-localhost ip6-loopback  

3. Directory /home/user/network_data/verification does NOT exist before the agent starts.

Expected artefact after successful task completion:

Path: /home/user/network_data/verification/localhost_resolution.log  
Exact contents (4 lines, UNIX newlines):

TicketID: DNS-0001  
IPv4 entry found: 127.0.0.1 localhost  
IPv6 entry found: ::1 localhost ip6-localhost ip6-loopback  
Status: PASS  

No other files need to be changed or created.
